name: ContextSlim — Context Window Profiler & Optimizer
description: See exactly what's eating your context window. Three local Python tools: context profiling, compression suggestions, and HTML report generation. Zero external dependencies, 100% local processing. Multi-provider support: OpenAI, Anthropic, Google. Token estimation within 10-15% accuracy.
review: Clean, well-documented, security-conscious utility filling a real gap. Local-only design is exemplary — processing sensitive context data without any network calls. LIMITATIONS.md shows intellectual honesty. Drax gave clean PASS.
